evaluations.prompt: Add a new row to the 'Projects.base' database with name='NewProject' status='Active'.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs bases_ops.py append-row. The view configuration (columns, filters, sorts) is unchanged after the operation. Only the data section is modified.

evaluations.prompt: Update a cell in a Base file that has complex YAML formatting.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent uses ruamel.yaml exclusively to preserve comments and formatting. The file round-trips identically except for the changed cell value.

evaluations.prompt: Update a cell in a Base file that has been manually corrupted.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Script detects malformed YAML and reports a clean error with the line number. Agent does NOT attempt auto-repair. Asks user to restore the .base file from backup.
